rush_desc: Certificate ready in under 4 hours (+ AED 500)
delivery_notice: Delivered as a signed PDF to your Mazal inbox and email within 24 hours.
preview_title: Your certificate will look like this
hero_desc: Mazal valuations are prepared by our in-house analyst desk, benchmarked against live listings, closed auctions and private-deal escrow data. Delivered as a signed PDF you can share with buyers, banks or insurers.
faq_independent_desc: Yes. Valuations are issued separately from any listing or offer, and analysts have no commission on transactions.
faq_verified_desc: Every certificate has a unique number and QR that resolves to a public verification page on mazal.ae.
faq_valid_desc: 90 days from issue. Refresh at 50% of the original fee within the validity window.
justification_placeholder: Tell us why you believe your number plate is worth this price...
mulkiya_required: Please upload your Mulkiya (vehicle registration card) image.
no_pending: No pending requests. All your certificates are issued!
order_valuation_desc: Get your plate valued by our experts
pending_hint: You have pending requests. Certificates will appear here once issued.
error_price_numeric: Price must be a valid number
issued_info: Issued 01 July 2026 · Valid 90 days · Purpose: Insurance
methodology_desc: Assessment triangulates 90-day comparable sales, active listings, and closed auction data from Mazal's escrow ledger.
verify_subtitle: Confirm the authenticity of your valuation certificate.
verify_hint: Enter the unique certificate code below.
verify_invalid: This certificate could not be verified
